---
title: 'GETTING THE RIGHT VOCAL/INSTRUMENT BALANCE'
date: '2018-03-25T16:30:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '7449565206205797251'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
---

<div dir="ltr"><br></div><div dir="ltr">Getting the right mix, good article.</div><div dir="ltr"><br></div><div dir="ltr"><br></div><div dir="ltr"><br></div><div dir="ltr"><a href="https://pro.harman.com/insights/entertainment/touring/getting-the-right-vocalinstrument-balance/">https://pro.harman.com/insights/entertainment/touring/getting-the-right-vocalinstrument-balance/</a></div><span>  </span>-- <br><div dir="ltr" class="gmail_signature" data-smartmail="gmail_signature"><div dir="ltr"><div class="MsoNormal" style="color:rgb(0,0,0);font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;font-size:medium"><p style="margin:0px"><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;" style="font-size:18pt"><br class="inbox-inbox-Apple-interchange-newline">Darrell Wolfe</font><font face="&quot;times new roman&quot; , serif"></font></p></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="color:rgb(0,0,0);font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;;font-size:medium"><p style="margin:0px"><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;"><br></font><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant </font></p><p style="margin:0px"><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;"><br></font></p><p style="margin:0px"><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;"><a href="mailto:me@DarrellWolfe.com">me@DarrellWolfe.com</a></font></p><p style="margin:0px"><br></p><p style="margin:0px"><font face="&quot;tempus sans itc&quot;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/">www.DarrellWolfe.com</a></font></p></div>  </div></div>
